title: Living in Boulder vlog 4/29/18: Google Earthing Boulder

enrichment.summary: Kyle vlogs from his Boulder apartment about his intensive Google Earth mapping project, which involves geolocating roughly 900 historical photos of Boulder and building detailed KMZ files for the area, including mining towns. He also describes his 'Boulder Rome' concept — overlaying ancient Rome's layout onto Boulder to create an immersive historical learning tool — and estimates the full project (Google Earthing Boulder, Rome, and all surrounding history) will take about two more years.
enrichment.speaker: kyle

stances.position: extremely enthusiastic; calls it 'the ultimate historical lesson' that lets you teleport into the past
expects roughly two more years of intensive work to finish Boulder, Rome, and surrounding history
describes himself as 'in deep space' — working until he passes out, finds it hard but rewarding

transcript.text: Living in Boulder, V-Log. It's 2.05 p.m. on April 29th, end of April.
